generated_oml:
instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for ambient temperature measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement 1"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureData1Transmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement 2"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureData2Transmitted
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTemperatureData1Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalTemperatureData2Transmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance InternalTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature measurement 1 from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureData1Transmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance InternalTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature measurement 2 from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureData2Transmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with two parameters: C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with four parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to virtual model"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares optimization in model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPiEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as controller for sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, BangBangControlService
]

instance PCBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for controlling heatbed and fan via Raspberry Pi GPIO"
    DTDFVocab:enables BangBangControlService
]

instance GitHubRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for code and specifications sharing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDevelopmentService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using Model A and Model B for thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares optimization using Scipy for model parameter calibration"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedParametersInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control for temperature regulation based on thresholds LL, UL, H, C"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatbedActivationAction, FanActivationAction
]

instance ModelDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Iterative model development and refinement based on real-world data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinementInsight
]

instance CalibratedParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters from model optimization for accurate thermal simulation"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models for control adjustments"
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current temperature readings from all DS18S20 sensors for monitoring"
]

instance ModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Improved model parameters from iterative refinement using real-world data"
]

instance HeatbedActivationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate heatbed when temperature falls below lower threshold LL"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanActivationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate fan for air circulation when temperature exceeds upper threshold UL"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated box (0.03 m³ volume) for thermal insulation"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) for heating the incubator system"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s) for air circulation in the incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, AmbientTemperatureSensor, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, RaspberryPiController, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) generated by the DT's controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which actuates physical components through MOSFETs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, simulation models; data flows via RabbitMQ between PT components and DT services as per Fig. 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; DT integrated into deployed physical system for monitoring and control during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions tested via experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity with three sensors); Model B validated as better for thermal inertia prediction; calibration minimizes residual error using least-squares optimization; uncertainty addressed through empirical validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ communication protocol between DT components and PT; Raspberry Pi GPIO with PCB (MOSFETs, optocouplers) for sensor/actuator interfacing."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT software components deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; all components hosted on-premises within the physical system."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety; optocouplers used for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current components to prevent hazards."
]
